p04_s00.source: P09a raw scan with the P04/S00 B-stack selected-pulse gate

p04c.b_s00_reproduction_source: shared P04/P09a raw B-stack S00 reproduction

p04b_downstream.target: B4+B6+B8 positive-lobe charge for penetrating B2-selected events

winner.criterion: lowest mean rank by res68_abs_frac across P04b and P04c external targets

excluded_features: P04b downstream target charge and downstream stave charge columns
P04c A-stack target charge and A-stack charge columns

next_tickets.title: P04n: independent calibration-pulse validation for external charge-proxy anomaly bias
next_tickets.body: Use calibration/forced-trigger or scaler-backed charge references, rather than same-event B/A charge transfer, to test whether the P04f baseline-excursion and early-pretrigger bias persists against a detector-external charge scale.

ticket.title: P04n: independent calibration-pulse validation for external charge-proxy anomaly bias
ticket.body: Use calibration/forced-trigger or scaler-backed charge references, rather than same-event B/A charge transfer, to test whether the P04f baseline-excursion and early-pretrigger bias persists against a detector-external charge scale.

finding: cnn1d is best on p04b_downstream with res68 0.2103 [0.2013, 0.2275]; residual_cnn_meta is best on p04c_ab_charge with res68 0.5199 [0.5093, 0.5375]. The cross-target winner is residual_cnn_meta. Matched anomaly effects for that method: p04b_downstream baseline_excursion delta res68 0.0119 [-0.1213, 0.2110]; p04b_downstream novel_early_pretrigger delta res68 -0.0305 [-0.0951, 0.0410]; p04c_ab_charge baseline_excursion delta res68 0.1326 [-0.0249, 0.3966]; p04c_ab_charge novel_early_pretrigger delta res68 -0.0400 [-0.1219, 0.0509]. Thus the P04f anomaly-bias signal is tested outside the duplicate-readout target; any surviving positive deltas are external-proxy effects, while null or unstable deltas bound the same-event electronics interpretation.
